title: Override the REPLACE WHERE predicate for a single refresh
body: You can now override a standalone streaming table's defined `REPLACE WHERE` predicate for a single refresh by adding a `WHERE` clause to the `REFRESH STREAMING TABLE` command. The override applies only to that refresh and doesn't change the table definition, which is useful for one-time backfills and corrections. This is supported only on standalone streaming tables created with a `FLOW REPLACE WHERE` clause. See [REFRESH (MATERIALIZED VIEW or STREAMING TABLE)](/aws/en/sql/language-manual/sql-ref-syntax-ddl-refresh-full).
